coastal.title: B.C. Wildfire Service calls for compliance amid reports of speeding and drone flights
coastal.description: The BC Wildfire Service is issuing a call for compliance, as two out-of-control wildfires continue to burn in the Fraser Canyon.

coastal.title: Veteran mediator appointed to help settle B.C. nurses’ dispute
coastal.description: Labour Minister Jennifer Whiteside said in a statement on Friday that Vince Ready and Amanda Rogers will act as special mediators to work with the parties for 10 days.

coastal.title: Tsleil-Waututh Nation files court challenge against Burrard Inlet dredging plan
coastal.description: The dredging work near the Second Narrows Bridge would allow oil tankers travelling to Trans Mountain's Burnaby terminal to carry more oil.

all.title: Canada orders deportation of ‘bottom-tier’ member of Bishnoi gang
all.description: While Bishnoi gang leaders face racketeering charges, Jashandeep Singh is among the lower-level suspects Canada has opted to deport rather than prosecute.
